final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an original, non-infringing marketing poster for OPPO Find X9, a brand exposure-focused full-screen advertisement.

Style/medium: bold commercial advertising poster, high-impact visual design, tech product launch aesthetic
Composition: vertical 9:16 aspect ratio, centered hero product placement, generous negative space for brand impact
Subject: OPPO Find X9 smartphone, sleek modern device with minimal bezels, premium finish
Scene/backdrop: clean gradient or abstract tech-inspired background, uncluttered to maximize brand focus
Lighting/mood: dramatic studio lighting with soft highlights on device edges, premium and aspirational mood
Color palette: OPPO brand colors (green accent) against dark or neutral base, high contrast for visual punch
Text (verbatim): "OPPO" "Find X9"
Constraints: must work at 1080×1920 resolution; brand name must be prominent and readable; designed for maximum visual impact
Avoid: cluttered backgrounds, generic stock photo aesthetic, watermark, low contrast text, distorted device proportions
